﻿<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
    
    <groupId>io.github.andrestubbe</groupId>
    <artifactId>fastglob-benchmark</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>
    
    <properties>
        <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
    </properties>
    
    <repositories>
        <repository>
            <id>jitpack.io</id>
            <url>https://jitpack.io</url>
        </repository>
    </repositories>
    
    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.github.andrestubbe</groupId>
            <artifactId>fastcore</artifactId>
            <version>v0.1.0</version>
        </dependency>
        
        <!-- Local System Path for Development -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.github.andrestubbe</groupId>
            <artifactId>fastglob</artifactId>
            <version>1.0.0</version>
            <scope>system</scope>
            <systemPath>${project.basedir}/../../target/fastglob-1.0.0.jar</systemPath>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>
    
    <build>
        <sourceDirectory>src/main/java</sourceDirectory>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.11.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>17</source>
                    <target>17</target>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>exec-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.1.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <mainClass>fastglob.Benchmark</mainClass>
                    <commandlineArgs>--enable-native-access=ALL-UNNAMED</commandlineArgs>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>

﻿<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
    
    <groupId>io.github.andrestubbe</groupId>
    <artifactId>fastglob-demo</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>
    
    <properties>
        <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
    </properties>
    
    <repositories>
        <repository>
            <id>jitpack.io</id>
            <url>https://jitpack.io</url>
        </repository>
    </repositories>
    
    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.github.andrestubbe</groupId>
            <artifactId>fastcore</artifactId>
            <version>v0.1.0</version>
        </dependency>
        
        <!-- ======================================================== -->
        <!-- DEVELOPMENT MODE (Local System Path)                     -->
        <!-- Uses the locally built JAR from the parent project.      -->
        <!-- Run 'mvn clean package' in the parent directory first.   -->
        <!-- ======================================================== -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.github.andrestubbe</groupId>
            <artifactId>fastglob</artifactId>
            <version>1.0.0</version>
            <scope>system</scope>
            <systemPath>${project.basedir}/../../target/fastglob-1.0.0.jar</systemPath>
        </dependency>
        
        <!-- ======================================================== -->
        <!-- PRODUCTION MODE (JitPack)                                -->
        <!-- Comment out the block above and uncomment this block     -->
        <!-- to test exactly how a real user would download it.       -->
        <!-- ======================================================== -->
        <!--
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.github.andrestubbe</groupId>
            <artifactId>fastglob</artifactId>
            <version>1.0.0</version>
        </dependency>
        -->
    </dependencies>
    
    <build>
        <sourceDirectory>src/main/java</sourceDirectory>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.11.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>17</source>
                    <target>17</target>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>exec-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.1.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <mainClass>fastglob.Demo</mainClass>
                    <!-- Required for some native operations -->
                    <commandlineArgs>--enable-native-access=ALL-UNNAMED</commandlineArgs>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>

﻿# FastGLOB Examples

This folder contains standalone example projects to demonstrate and test the library.

## Demo

The `Demo` project provides a simple "Hello World" implementation.

To run it locally using the JAR you just built:
```bash
cd Demo
mvn compile exec:java
```

## Benchmark

The `Benchmark` project compares the performance of the native FastGLOB library against standard Java equivalents.

To run it:
```bash
cd Benchmark
mvn compile exec:java
```

> **Note:** By default, the `pom.xml` files in these examples are configured to use `<scope>system</scope>` pointing to the `target/` directory of the parent project. This allows you to test changes immediately after building the main library without publishing to a repository. To see how an external user would use it via JitPack, check the comments inside the `pom.xml`.

﻿# FastAnimation v0.1.0 — Initial Release 🚀

## 🎉 Version 0.1.0: First Public Release
**Release Date:** 2026-05-23  
**Tag:** `v0.1.0`

---

## ✨ Features

### High-Performance Animation Timeline
- Chained tweens and parallel timelines.
- Seamless integration with FastDWM for 1ms VSync precision.

---

## 📦 Installation (JitPack)

### Maven
```xml
<dependencies>
    <dependency>
        <groupId>com.github.andrestubbe</groupId>
        <artifactId>fastanimation</artifactId>
        <version>0.1.0</version>
    </dependency>

    <!-- FastCore (Required Native Loader) -->
    <dependency>
        <groupId>com.github.andrestubbe</groupId>
        <artifactId>fastcore</artifactId>
        <version>0.1.0</version>
    </dependency>
</dependencies>
```

---

## 🔧 Technical Details
- **Architecture:** Pure Java 17 + JNI.
- **Build System:** Standardized Maven pipeline.

---

## 🙏 Credits
- **FastCore:** Unified JNI loading engine.

**Part of the FastJava Ecosystem** — *Making the JVM faster.*

﻿# FastDWM v0.1.0 — Initial Release 🚀

## 🎉 Version 0.1.0: First Public Release
**Release Date:** 2026-05-23  
**Tag:** `v0.1.0`

---

## ✨ Features

### Initial Windows Desktop Window Manager Integration
- Exposes native `DwmFlush` for millisecond-perfect VSync timing.
- Integrates `timeSetEvent` for 1ms heartbeat scheduling.

---

## 📦 Installation (JitPack)

### Maven
```xml
<dependencies>
    <dependency>
        <groupId>com.github.andrestubbe</groupId>
        <artifactId>fastdwm</artifactId>
        <version>0.1.0</version>
    </dependency>

    <!-- FastCore (Required Native Loader) -->
    <dependency>
        <groupId>com.github.andrestubbe</groupId>
        <artifactId>fastcore</artifactId>
        <version>0.1.0</version>
    </dependency>
</dependencies>
```

---

## 🔧 Technical Details
- **Native DLL:** `fastdwm.dll` (bundled inside JAR).
- **Architecture:** Windows JNI.
- **Build System:** Standardized Maven pipeline.

---

## 🙏 Credits
- **FastCore:** Unified JNI loading engine.

**Part of the FastJava Ecosystem** — *Making the JVM faster.*

﻿================================================================================
YouTube Video Description: [MODULE_NAME] for Java 📺⚡
================================================================================

TITLE:
[MODULE_NAME] for Java — High-Performance [SHORT_SUBTITLE]

DESCRIPTION:
[MODULE_NAME] is a high-performance [MODULE_DESCRIPTION].
Engineered for locked 120 FPS refresh rates, premium visual styling, and native JNI console hooks, it operates completely independently of heavy, legacy terminal wrappers.

Key Features:
- Locked 120 FPS Refresh Rate: Seamless rendering with ultra-low latency JNI console dimension tracking.
- 24-Bit True Color: Support for direct RGB escape codes for foreground and background customization.
- UTF-32 Codepoint Grids: Zero-copy primitive integer cell buffers that eliminate Emoji/Unicode surrogate split bugs (e.g. 🚀, 🌈, ⚡, 🧊).
- Window resize auto-rebuilds: Instant layout recalculation through native dim polling.
- Zero Dependencies: Native integration with the FastJava ecosystem to build responsive, premium command-line visual dashboards.

Hero Demonstrations:
- Demo A: Fullscreen OLED Sine Wave / Rainbow Wave.
- Demo B: Glassmorphic Telemetry Dashboard: Animated progress gauges, real-time wave graphs, and Win32 JNI size monitoring.
- Demo C: Real-Time 3D Rotating Cube: Tumbling wireframe graphics projected in real-time, backed by custom Bresenham's line blitting and a drifting starfield backdrop!

GitHub: https://github.com/andrestubbe/[MODULE_NAME]
FastJava Ecosystem: https://github.com/andrestubbe

Part of the FastJava Ecosystem — Making the JVM faster.

TAGS:
FastJava, Java, Terminal, TUI, TrueColor, JNI, CLI, DeveloperTools, [MODULE_NAME]
